name: project-manager
description: Manage project-scoped knowledge bases of notes, decisions, and bookmarks under projects/, with context switching and cross-project search.

interface.shortDescription: Manage project-scoped knowledge bases of notes, decisions, and bookmarks under projects/, with context switching and cross-project search.
interface.longDescription: Create and maintain slugged project directories with CONTEXT.md, dated notes, and a shared bookmarks store, loading relevant context when switching projects.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Project Manager safely.
